calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2016 Continued To Aug-31-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-03-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS EIGOMANGA LLC and UCHENNA OSUEKE'S DEMURRER TO both causes of action in the second amended complaint is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff Taiko Fujimura has failed to sufficiently allege the material terms of the alleged contract, what express and implied terms were breached, and when the breaches occurred. Plaintiff has not sufficiently alleged that all parties to the alleged contract agreed in January, 2011 that plaintiff would receive a 30% royalty share from the sale of the game. The inconsistencies between the first and second amended complaints regarding the payment of royalties compel the conclusion that the parties did not agree in January 2011 that plaintiff would receive a 30% royalty share. (SAC 9, 18; FAC 16.) Plaintiff has also failed to sufficiently allege when the breaches occurred. Plaintiff's contention in her opposition papers that the breach occurred on December 3, 2012 is contradicted by the allegations in the second amended complaint that prior to the December 3, 2012, meeting defendants "had failed in their obligations to pay any royalties despite the completion of all services, the successful release of the game, and the subsequent sales." (SAC 17.) Because plaintiff has failed to remedy the deficiencies in her complaint that were identified in the March 7, 2016 and there does not appear any reasonable possibility that those deficiencies can be remedied, the current demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order that tracks the tentative and comply with
CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2016 Continued To Jun-29-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2016 Continued To May-18-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANTS EIGOMANGA, LLC AND UCHENNA OSUEKE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT, Defendants' demurrer to the two causes of action alleged in the first amended complaint is sustained with twenty days leave to amend. While the first amended complaint is an improvement over the complaint, it still fails to allege with clarity the material terms of the alleged contract, what express and implied terms were breached, and when the breaches occurred. Plaintiff is given one final opportunity to provide the needed clarification if she can do so in good faith. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2015 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS EIGOMANGA, LLC AND UCHENNA AUSTIN OSUEKE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with twenty days leave to amend. Although defendants' standing argument lacks merit, the complaint is unclear on several points which should be clarified in an amended complaint. The points requiring greater clarity are: 1) whether the alleged contract is written, oral and/or implied, 2) the material terms of the contract, 3) the contracting parties, and 4) when the breaches occurred. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Irene L. Tofft, CSR #12913. (302/HK)
